title: The Leonardo Collection Fish Jug Vase Cream 20cm | Ceramic or Glass for Kitchen Use | Beautiful Cream or Milk Jug for Daily Needs | Versatile Water Jug
features: MULTI-USE CERAMIC OR GLASS JUG: This versatile jug can be used as a glass water filter jug, milk jug, or even a cream jug. Whether serving beverages or as a small measuring jug for your kitchen, it combines functionality with style for daily use.

STYLISH WATER JUG: Enjoy the practicality of a glass jug that doubles as a water jug for hydration or a decorative milk jug for your coffee machine. Crafted from durable ceramic or glass, it's a must-have for both kitchen and home use.

FUNCTIONAL & ELEGANT DESIGN: Featuring a classic design, this glass water jug is perfect for serving drinks or flowers. The filter jug is ideal for refreshing water, while the small milk jug offers a perfect touch for coffee or tea servings in your kitchen.

IDEAL FOR DAILY USE: From the small milk jug to the larger glass jug, this water filter jug provides both style and practicality. It serves as a perfect milk jug for coffee machine, and can be used as a decorative vase or functional water jug.

VERSATILE FOR KITCHEN & HOME: Whether for serving milk, water, or as a small measuring jug, this glass water filter jug is ideal for any kitchen. Use it as a water jug or a decorative vase, adding both function and beauty to your home.
